case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS PHILLIPS, VICTOR LEON.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-27-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-14-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WILL BE OUT OF TOWN ON 2/27/01.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, VICTOR LEON. $1,892.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,892.00, DEFENDNAT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $200.00 BY 3/16/01. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
